long_term_goal: Continuously advance Monsoon Sovereigns from Foundation Ready through the M0 engineering baseline and toward vertical-slice readiness by selecting dependency-ready tasks, enforcing review/test/Human Gate controls, and preserving frozen product, platform, architecture, determinism, security, and historical-policy decisions.

unresolved_risks.description: Autonomous continuation can hide scope drift if the lead fails to re-check allowed paths, forbidden paths, and Human Gates after each handoff.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: docs/27-autonomous-goal-mode.md requires per-task diff-scope checks, handoff validation, task validation, ready/list checks, and explicit stop conditions.

unresolved_risks.description: Thread IDs are session-local and may become stale after Codex restart.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Recover from persisted handoffs, task JSON, git status, and the state file; spawn replacement role threads when needed.

unresolved_risks.description: Literal Chromium and packaged Electron host hash extraction is not yet directly proven; M1 only proves Node plus Worker-compatible hash equality with browser/desktop smoke.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Add an explicit Chromium plus Electron host hash canary before M2 exit or before making any platform-host determinism claim.

unresolved_risks.description: SIM-006 content-runtime is not yet wired through a sim-core boot-boundary contract test.
unresolved_risks.mitigation: Add the sim-core/content-runtime boot-boundary contract test during M2 world/content integration.

human_gate.approval: M0-EXIT-AND-M1-AUTONOMOUS-ENTRY-001 cleared the M0 milestone exit gate and authorized M1 autonomous execution.
next_required_for: new R4 decisions without explicit approval
release, brand, commercial, telemetry, networking, arbitrary-code Mod, or macOS desktop commitments
